title: Cooraby Toss and Catch Paddle Game Disc 4 Set Paddle Toss and Catch Ball Sport Game Suitable for Sports, Beach and Party Favor with Storage Bag, 8 Paddles and 8 Balls (15.5cm)
features: Size: the size of each paddle is 6.1 inches/15.5 cm in diameter, the sticky ball is 1.8 inches/4.5 cm in diameter, and the soft ball is 2.48 inches/6.3 cm in diameter, mini sizes can meet your need; the bag is 36 cm in length and 25 cm in width, very suitable for you to hold the paddles and balls inside

Material: the paddle with black edge adopts quality plastic and nylon, light in weight, sturdy and durable, and not easy to deform or damage, you can catch balls easily; the hard ball is made of plastic, cement, rubber and nylon, while the soft ball is made of sponge and cloth, you can feel free to use them

Quantity: you will receive 4 sets of toss and catch ball game tools, 2 paddles, 1 sticky ball, 1 soft ball for each set, in total of 8 paddles, 4 sticky balls, 4 soft balls, enough for you to play and share with your friends, family; we also provide you with 1 black drawstring bag to hold them inside for easy storage and carrying

How to play: the paddle and the ball is very sticky, easy for you to get the ball; hold a paddle in your hand and try to catch the ball your partner throw into you, very fun indeed; each paddle attaches with an adjustable strap that can be adjusted according to your hand sizes, suitable for most people

Wide range of uses: the toss and catch ball set is suitable for beaches, gardens, parks, yards, school, where you can play the game with your family, friends, classmates to have much fun and share a memorable time
